enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder, describing how he solved two tech problems: freeing up storage on his recording device by deleting a folder, and devising a workaround to convert Kindle audiobooks to MP3 by having speakers play them aloud while his computer records and converts them, bypassing Amazon's DRM restrictions. He also mentions organizing his phone's file storage and working on his audiobook website.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Greedy and anti-consumer; circumventing it is justified
Calls him a 'greedy rich belly man' with contempt
Best of both worlds — word search plus audio is the ideal setup
